name: Golden Vegetable Fondue
recipeIngredient: Cooked Sausages and Cooked Potatoes to serve
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop all vegetables finely.
2. Put the chopped vegetables into a saucepan with chicken stock.
3. Bring to a boil and simmer until just tender.
4. Drain the vegetables and let them cool slightly.
5. Puree the vegetables in a blender or food processor.
6. Pass the puree through a sieve into the fondue pot.
7. Place the pot over low heat.
8. Gradually beat in the butter.
9. Season with salt, pepper, and nutmeg.
10. Keep hot over the burner while dipping sausages and potatoes into the vegetable mixture.
(Serves 4-6)
